name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual expense report generation causes delays in financial reporting. We automate expense categorization instead of manual spreadsheets and email submissions.
problem_solved: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual expense report generation causes delays in financial reporting. We automate expense categorization instead of manual spreadsheets and email submissions.
